reviews.review_description: I was streaming different vr games for my audience and we found this gem. Got stuck playing it for several hours. Love the synthwave style as well!

I really love this game I love The vibes and the fighting and all this different stuff that it has especially relating to weapon abilities and such, but there is a really major problem I'm having regarding chapter 2. when it gets to the point where you're supposed to like laser cut out a part of the floor and drop down it just keeps dropping me down below the hallway I'm supposed to be in so I'm always just stuck. and also if I step even slightly outside of the little square that you're supposed to be on I just immediately fall through the floor and fall through the second hallway and just fall down under everything.

I'm a big fan of the retro 80s style and Tron, so I fell in love with this game immediately. The combat and exploration is very fun and I found myself hopping in the area mode after work for a quick hack and slash. Overall for 10 dollars you can't beat the price. Definitely check it out if you're on the fence. Would love to have a Tron disc-like weapon to complete the feeling of being on the grid!
